query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO accounts (code, name, nameAr, type, subtype, description, isActive, isSystem, balance)
VALUES ('4200', 'Sales Discounts & Returns', 'خصومات المبيعات', 'revenue', 'contra_revenue', 'Contra-revenue account for coupon discounts and order returns', 1, 1, 0);
